string.text: Commander... Hello. I'm sorry... I'm a bit nervous. It's been ten years since I last saw you, and now that we're meeting again, I feel like I have too much to say.
It's okay, Alva. Good to see you again.
Goodmorning, Commander. I've already sorted out today's schedule.
Alva, what do you think about the Elmo?

The Elmo is... more comfortable than I expected. Everyone here has their place, including me. It's an amazing feeling... If we had served in Griffin instead of the NSA ten years ago, we might have experienced it much earlier.
Okay Alva, please head back to base. I will handle it from here.
Dr. Shaw's designs will not go out of style.
